title: Bad Mod:Recheesed
description: A bad mod, or is it? Vsauce theme plays...
body:
**Bad Mod is in development it can contain bugs and low quality textures and uselesness**

This mod is developed by OBX555 and thanks to tyuXX for his help on this mod

# Featuring:

### New blocks:
- multiblock furnace very soon lol

### New Tools:
- Crude Steel set of armor
- tin set of tools and armor
- zinc set of tools and armor

### New Stuff:
- Dusts to make steel
- hammers
- spheres(unlocks a new tier by proving you are lifeless enough to make this stuff)
- tin
- zinc

### Also check out [Grimm's Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/gsm) basicaly bad mod but fancy
**This mods release will be probably at release 1.0
